data.description: AgiBot World Colosseo: A Large-scale Manipulation Platform for Scalable and Intelligent Embodied Systems cites or references MetaWorld-X: Hierarchical World Modeling via VLM-Orchestrated Experts for Humanoid Loco-Manipulation.
